nodes.label: AI as efficient quiz/test creator
nodes.grounding_span: I mostly use it to create quiz or test questions for me, or to create answer keys for me.

nodes.label: AI adherence to user specifications
nodes.grounding_span: I have assumed what I said means one thing and AI interprets it completely differently.

nodes.label: AI as reliable double-checker
nodes.label_negative: AI as error-prone requiring manual verification
nodes.grounding_span: It does give me another 'person' working the problems so I can feel better that I have done them correctly.

nodes.label: AI improvement over time
nodes.grounding_span: curiosity on whether it has improved and learned and is getting better

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: it would be faster and more efficient to just do the work myself

nodes.label: Accuracy and correctness
nodes.grounding_span: I have to work the problems myself anyway because of the frequency of errors.

nodes.label: Confidence and verification
nodes.grounding_span: I can feel better that I have done them correctly.

nodes.label: Cautious optimism about AI improvement
nodes.grounding_span: I think at the rate AI is improving, I will be able to use it more in the future.

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as verification tool
nodes.grounding_span: It does give me another 'person' working the problems so I can feel better that I have done them correctly.

nodes.label: Iterative specification and adjustment
nodes.grounding_span: I will give as many specs as I can think of up front, but I do end up going back and making quite a few adjustments sometimes.

nodes.label: Experimental and curiosity-driven exploration
nodes.grounding_span: Mostly just curiosity on whether it has improved and learned and is getting better.
